emails.subject: FW: 10/25 Power Export Tab Information
emails.body: FW: 10/25 Power Export Tab Information I found out where the retail number is coming from. You are picking up an EES West portfolio which is incorrect. That is our test env't only and not in production. John

emails.subject: RE: 10/25 Power Export Tab Information
emails.body: John can you give me the portfolio name? Thanks, Susan

emails.subject: RE: 10/25 Power Export Tab Information
emails.body: I went to the file in the O drive, to the extract tab. IF you filter Enpower west as the portfolio ID and EES-Books-Enpower as the book id, the total PV's value ties to the retail west number that was exported. If you go to the far right on this tab, it says the region detail is East. John
